scripts.copy:frontend: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');function cp(s,d){fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync(s)){const sp=p.join(s,f),dp=p.join(d,f);fs.statSync(sp).isDirectory()?cp(sp,dp):fs.copyFileSync(sp,dp)}}cp('../web/frontend/out','src-tauri/resources/frontend')"
